components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action button for standard click and submit flows.
components.styleRequirement: Import edt-lib/styles.css or edt-lib/index.scss once.
antiPatterns: Do not import from internal button paths.
Do not replace with ad hoc button wrappers for common CTA use cases.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR when imported from package root.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Action button that renders icon-only interactions.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not omit aria-label for icon-only actions.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; icons are rendered from the public icon set.

components.name: TextButton
components.description: Low-emphasis textual action for secondary flows.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use as the only primary CTA on complex forms.

components.name: CheckButton
components.description: Checkbox-like control styled as part of the library action set.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not substitute it for radio-style mutually exclusive choices.
accessibilityNotes: Respect checked and disabled state semantics.

components.name: RadioButton
components.description: Single-choice control for mutually exclusive options.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use it for multi-select behavior.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Boolean on/off toggle for settings and preference flows.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use for submit actions or navigation.

components.name: TextBox
components.description: Single-line text input with variants, adornments, and helper text.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not bypass the public prop API with custom internal class imports.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; id generation uses React-safe APIs.
accessibilityNotes: Preserve helper text and invalid state semantics.

components.name: TextArea
components.description: Multi-line text input with sizing and optional auto-resize.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not manage sizing through private DOM manipulation outside the component.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; resize behavior activates after mount.

components.name: Selector
components.description: Select control with options, loading, and helper/error feedback.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not replace option arrays with hardcoded DOM children in consumer code.
accessibilityNotes: Preserve error messaging and disabled state.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Date input primitive for calendar and scheduling interactions.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not import private styles or private date helpers from source.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR for standard controlled usage.
accessibilityNotes: Provide clear labels and error messaging.

components.name: Message
components.description: Inline feedback surface for persistent status and messaging.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use as a transient toast replacement when Snackbar is the correct pattern.

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: Transient feedback surface with optional action handling.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use for long-form inline content.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; timed behavior occurs on the client.

components.name: Modal
components.description: Overlay dialog for interruptive workflows and confirmation flows.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use multiple nested modals.
Do not hide close behavior without another clear exit.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; open-state side effects are handled after mount.
accessibilityNotes: Escape and close button behavior must remain intact.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Loading indicator for pending UI states.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not show indefinite spinners without adjacent progress context for long-running operations.
accessibilityNotes: Keep aria-label meaningful when loading context is not visible.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Contextual hover or focus hint for compact UI affordances.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use tooltips as the only way to expose critical information.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; visibility is interaction-driven.
accessibilityNotes: Do not hide important text only in tooltip copy.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Compact status or label chip for metadata display.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not overload Tag as a button without explicit interaction semantics.
accessibilityNotes: Text content should stay readable without color alone.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Linear navigation trail for hierarchical context.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use breadcrumbs for single-step pages with no hierarchy.
accessibilityNotes: Labels should reflect the actual navigation path.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Segmented navigation between related content panels.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use tabs for long sequential workflows.
accessibilityNotes: Keep tab labels short and meaningful.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page-navigation control for paged result sets.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not render when total page count is unknown or zero.
accessibilityNotes: Current page must be announced through aria-current.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Structured action list for contextual command groups.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not rebuild menu logic from scratch when the library menu already fits.

components.name: FloatingMenu
components.description: Popup action menu anchored to a trigger element.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not hide essential navigation only inside floating menus.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR; menu behavior is interaction-driven.
accessibilityNotes: Selection callbacks should preserve clear focus behavior.

components.name: Layout
components.description: Application shell container for page-level composition.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not document layout usage with centered Storybook canvas.
accessibilityNotes: Use semantic main content inside the shell.

components.name: NavBar
components.description: Top navigation surface for app shells.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not duplicate shell navigation wrappers when NavBar already fits the use case.
accessibilityNotes: Navigation children should stay semantically navigable.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Footer surface for app shells and page framing.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not treat Footer as an inline content container inside cards.
accessibilityNotes: Footer content should remain readable and structured.

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with optional title, subtitle, image, and click behavior.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use clickable Card without clear affordance or keyboard semantics.
accessibilityNotes: Images should include alt text when meaningful.

components.name: Title
components.description: Heading primitive with semantic size and visual variant controls.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use visual heading size without considering semantic heading order.

components.name: Thumbnail
components.description: Compact media preview for images or related visual content.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not omit alt text when the image conveys content.
accessibilityNotes: Always provide meaningful alt text for content images.

components.name: MoneyAmount
components.description: Localized currency and amount display component.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not format currency manually when MoneyAmount already covers the use case.
components.ssrNotes: Safe in SSR if locale behavior is acceptable for the deployment runtime.
accessibilityNotes: Keep locale and currency explicit when ambiguity is possible.

components.name: CarouselSnapped
components.description: Snap-based carousel for horizontally browsable content.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use as a replacement for simple static lists when no horizontal browsing is needed.
accessibilityNotes: Ensure navigation controls remain reachable when enabled.

components.name: ListControl
components.description: Selectable list surface for single or multi-select interactions.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not rebuild selectable list logic with plain divs when ListControl already covers it.
accessibilityNotes: Selection changes should remain keyboard reachable.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Public icon primitive backed by the library icon catalog.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once.
antiPatterns: Do not use unlabeled icons as the only content of an interactive control unless wrapped in IconButton with aria-label.
accessibilityNotes: Interactive icon usage should remain labeled through the parent control.

components.name: ThemeProvider
components.description: Runtime theming provider that coordinates light, dark, and system modes.
components.styleRequirement: Import a public stylesheet entry once before relying on theme tokens.
antiPatterns: Do not nest multiple ThemeProvider instances unless you are deliberately scoping a theme boundary.
Do not access browser theme APIs during render from consumer code.
components.ssrNotes: Designed for SSR-safe usage; use ssrFallbackTheme for deterministic first render.
accessibilityNotes: Theme changes should preserve contrast expectations and not remove semantic labels.
